summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of FORGE v10 P1/P2/P3 features: ① Project snapshots (create/list/restore with auto-safety/delete), ② Public showcase (visibility toggle, public listing, single project view), ③ Fork (clone project with files/memory, increment fork_count), ④ Reasoning stream (<thinking> tag handling). All 43 v10 tests passed + 31/32 v9 regression tests passed (1 flaky multi-agent test).
critical_code_review_comments: Snapshots: POST /snapshots creates snapshot in project_snapshots collection, returns snapshot_id + label (files array excluded for performance)
Snapshots: GET /snapshots returns newest-first, excludes files array

Snapshots: POST /restore auto-creates safety snapshot 'Auto: before restore of...' BEFORE wiping, wipes all project_files, writes snapshot files back, creates version entries with source='snapshot_restore', sends notification kind='restored'
Snapshots: Restore is reversible via the auto-safety snapshot
Snapshots: DELETE removes snapshot; second delete returns 404
Snapshots: All mutation endpoints reject viewer role with 403
Visibility: PUT /visibility with is_public=true sets published_at first time only
Visibility: PUT /visibility with is_public=false does NOT reset published_at
Visibility: Non-owner gets 404 'Only the owner can change visibility'
Showcase: GET /showcase (no auth) returns only is_public=true projects, enriched with owner_name and owner_picture
Showcase: GET /showcase?sort=popular sorts by fork_count desc
Showcase: GET /showcase/{id} returns public project or 404 if private
Fork: POST /showcase/{id}/fork clones project, copies files, copies memory, increments source.fork_count, sets forked_from and forked_from_name
Fork: Creates version entries with source='fork'
Fork: Forked project appears in user's /api/projects list
Fork: Own project returns 400 'You already own this project'
Fork: Private/missing project returns 404
Fork: Unauthed returns 401
Reasoning: Chat stream with <thinking> tags emits 'reasoning' SSE event before token events
Reasoning: Persisted message content does NOT contain <thinking>...</thinking> literal
Reasoning: Chat works fine when LLM doesn't emit <thinking> tags
Reasoning: Agent mode preserves full reply (does NOT strip <thinking>)

test_credentials.note: Test data seeded via mongosh fixture in test file

seed_data_creation: Created test users (owner, viewer, forker) + sessions + project with files + memory via mongosh for authenticated endpoint testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: v10 P1/P2/P3 features fully tested: (1) Snapshots - POST /snapshots creates snapshot (files excluded from response), GET /snapshots returns newest-first (files excluded), POST /restore auto-creates safety snapshot before wiping, creates version entries with source='snapshot_restore', sends notification kind='restored', DELETE removes snapshot (second delete 404), viewer role blocked with 403. (2) Visibility - PUT /visibility sets is_public + showcase_tagline, published_at set first time only (not reset on re-publish), non-owner gets 404. (3) Showcase - GET /showcase (no auth) returns public projects with owner_name/owner_picture, sort=popular sorts by fork_count desc, GET /showcase/{id} returns public project or 404. (4) Fork - POST /showcase/{id}/fork clones project/files/memory, increments fork_count, sets forked_from/forked_from_name, creates version entries with source='fork', own project returns 400, private/missing returns 404, unauthed returns 401. (5) Reasoning - <thinking> tags split into 'reasoning' SSE event, persisted message excludes <thinking>, agent mode preserves full reply.

backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/snapshots creates snapshot, returns snapshot_id + label (files excluded)
POST /api/projects/{id}/snapshots with no label gets auto-generated label
GET /api/projects/{id}/snapshots returns newest-first, excludes files array
POST /api/projects/{id}/snapshots/{sid}/restore creates version entries with source='snapshot_restore'
POST /api/projects/{id}/snapshots/{sid}/restore is reversible via safety snapshot
PUT /api/projects/{id}/visibility with is_public=true sets published_at first time
PUT /api/projects/{id}/visibility with is_public=false does NOT reset published_at
PUT /api/projects/{id}/visibility re-publish does NOT update published_at
GET /api/showcase (no auth) returns only public projects with owner_name/owner_picture
POST /api/showcase/{id}/fork clones project, files, memory, increments fork_count
POST /api/showcase/{id}/fork creates version entries with source='fork'
POST /api/showcase/{id}/fork appears in user's projects list
Chat stream with <thinking> emits 'reasoning' SSE event
Chat stream persisted message excludes <thinking> literal
Agent mode preserves full reply (no <thinking> stripping)

mocked_apis.none: No mocking - all LLM calls are real via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY through emergentintegrations

from_previous_iterations.emergentintegrations_library_bug: get_checkout_status() fails with Pydantic validation error - checkout creation works, status polling returns 502

flaky_tests.test_multi_agent_message_contains_three_: Intermittent failure due to SSE streaming timing - multi-agent orchestration works but test sometimes misses done event
